diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,159 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: imports from `../../hono`, `../../hono-base`, `../../types`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory class provides createHandlers for stacking handlers/middleware with generic types supporting up to 10 handlers. createFactory factory function and createMiddleware are also exported. Used for building structured Hono apps with typed handler composition.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: imports from `../../context`, `../../request/constants`, `../../types`, `../../utils/url`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Helper functions to inspect matched routes in Hono applications. Provides route matching status, registered paths, base paths, and path calculations with routing parameters. Used for debugging and logging route structures.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSMessageReceive
+- Reads as: imports from `../../context`, `../../types`, `../../utils/http-status`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper for handling WS events (open, message, close, error) in Hono. Provides WSContext class for sending messages and managing readyState, protocol, and url. Supports both functional and curried event-based patterns.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, setCookie, getSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: imports from `../../context`, `../../utils/cookie`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Functions for reading and writing cookies in Hono. Supports getCookie for reading, setCookie/setSignedCookie for writing, and prefix options (none, secure, host) for cross-domain security. Cookie parsing and serialization use underlying utils/cookie module.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: imports from `../../client`, `../../context`, `../../hono`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Creates testing client for Hono apps. Wraps the app with custom fetch implementation to allow HTTP requests against the app during unit/e2e tests. Uses the hc (Hono Client) function with local baseUrl.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: imports from `../../context`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection and environment access helper. Detects execution runtime (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light). Provides `env` function to access runtime-specific bindings and environment variables. Used for platform-specific feature detection.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: imports from `../../helper/html`, `../../jsx/constants`, `../../jsx/dom/css`, `./common`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for server-side rendering with dynamic content. Generates unique class names via hashing, manages styles in injected `<style>` elements, and handles async CSS variables. Supports `@keyframes` and `view-transition` for web transitions.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, raw, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID
+- Reads as: exports from this file, no imports from external paths
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Common utility functions for core/helper css module. Provides CSS processing functions, minification, slug generation, and helper functions for both core and core/helper css. Uses hash-based class naming by default.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: imports from `../../http-exception`, `../../utils/headers`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Proxy fetch API for forwarding requests to external servers. Strips hop-by-hop headers and optionally enforces RFC 9110 strict compliance for Connection header processing. Supports custom fetch, request initialization, and header manipulation.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: imports from `../../hono`, `../../types`, `../../utils/color`, `../../utils/handler`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting Hono routes. `inspectRoutes` returns array of route data with path, method, handler name, and middleware status. `showRoutes` prints formatted route table to console. `getRouterName` identifies router type from app.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: raw, html
+- Reads as: imports from `../../utils/html`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML helper for escaping content and template rendering. `raw` passes content as-is, `html` template tag escapes values automatically. Returns sync or async string/html. Uses string buffer with callback resolution for proper escaping.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: re-exports from ssg.ts, middleware exports, plugins
+- Reads as: re-exports from `./ssg`, `./middleware`, `./plugins`
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
